video_title: Guy Fieri Returns to Outrageous Sandwich Shop in Boston | Diners, Drive-Ins & Dives | Food Network

restaurants.name: Blunch
restaurants.guy_intro: Back in 2014, when I was in Boston, an old buddy of mine sent me to a little sandwich shop just bursting with flavors. And thankfully, those directions and tastes still apply. This is Blunch. Welcome to Blunch, where TLC is coming from Nicky Christo, who is scratch-making sandwiches pressed to impress.

dishes.description: Hand-sliced chicken breast poached with olive oil, dried basil, granulated garlic, black pepper, Italian seasoning, granulated onion, kosher salt, and lemon juice. Layered with mozzarella cheese and oven-roasted tomatoes, then pressed and served with artichoke aioli.
dishes.guy_response: It's a great sandwich. This is a roast chicken dinner on really good bread. The bird is the word.

dishes.description: Baked egg style with kosher salt, black pepper, and light cream. Built with hickory smoked bacon, Vermont cheddar cheese, house-made spicy aioli (chipotle peppers, adobo sauce, fresh cilantro, lime juice, mayonnaise), and house-made pickles, finished with tarragon.
dishes.guy_response: This is not just your takeout egg sandwich. This is fluffy egg, savory bacon, aioli sauce. It's really special. I like the spicy aioli. Just gives it a little kick.

dishes.description: A pressed sandwich featuring whipped goat cheese with light cream, fresh basil pesto, pureed Kalamata olives, fresh tomatoes, quartered artichoke hearts, and oven-roasted tomatoes.
dishes.guy_response: You have balanced it perfectly. It's outrageous.

dishes.description: Roast beef seasoned with salt, pepper, rosemary, onion, garlic, marjoram, and basil, then roasted and sliced. Combined with caramelized melted onions (with kosher salt, black pepper, rosemary, and cinnamon), blue cheese, oven-roasted tomatoes, and finished with crispy shallots and saba, then pressed.
dishes.guy_response: The roast beef perfectly cooked with the warm blue cheese, caramelized onions, a little touch of sweetness, all pressed perfectly. It was really fantastic.
